priority_tier: PRIMARY — these are artifacts pulled directly from the 8 annotated-bibliography sources

primary-csere-car-and-driver-1987.creator: Car and Driver / Hearst
primary-csere-car-and-driver-1987.description: Period photograph accompanying Csaba Csere's November 1987 archived test review of the Porsche 959 in Car and Driver.
primary-csere-car-and-driver-1987.chicago_caption: Car and Driver, *Porsche 959 Road Test Photograph*, November 1987, via Hearst archives.
primary-csere-car-and-driver-1987.chicago_bibliography: Csere, Csaba. "1987 Porsche 959 — Archived Test." *Car and Driver*, November 1987. Photograph via Hearst archives. https://www.caranddriver.com/reviews/a15143088/1987-porsche-959-archived-test-review/.

primary-csere-car-and-driver-1987.creator: Car and Driver / Hearst

primary-csere-car-and-driver-1987.chicago_bibliography: Csere, Csaba. "1987 Porsche 959 — Archived Test." *Car and Driver*, November 1987. Photograph via Hearst archives. https://www.caranddriver.com/reviews/a15143088/1987-porsche-959-archived-test-review/.

secondary-kimble-motorsport-cutaway.creator: David Kimble (illustrator) / Motorsport.com
secondary-kimble-motorsport-cutaway.year: 2016 (publication); cutaway based on original 1980s Porsche factory technical drawings
secondary-kimble-motorsport-cutaway.description: David Kimble's famous Porsche 959 cutaway, published by Motorsport.com in 2016. Shows the twin-sequential-turbo flat-six, PSK all-wheel drive, aluminum-over-Kevlar body, and the six-speed gearbox — all the engineering systems Csere praised in his 1987 Car and Driver test.
secondary-kimble-motorsport-cutaway.chicago_bibliography: Kimble, David. "Cutaway Classic: Explore the Amazing Porsche 959." *Motorsport.com*, June 8, 2016. Illustration. https://www.motorsport.com/automotive/news/cutaway-classic-explore-the-amazing-porsche-959-745046/745046/.
